= stem-test(1)
:doctype: manpage
:manmanual: Test Manual
:mansource: Test 1.0
:stem: latexmath
:revdate: 2025-06-01

== Name

stem-test - test stem/math rendering

== Synopsis

*stem-test*

== Description

An inline formula: stem:[x^2 + y^2 = z^2].

[stem]
++++
x = (-b +- sqrt(b^2 - 4ac)) / (2a)
++++
